element_introduction_order.element: Basic horizontal scrolling and ship movement
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Player learns directional control and speed adjustment mechanics
Revealed through up/down screen movement to discover hidden enemies and power-ups

element_introduction_order.element: Basic weapon power-ups (missiles, lasers with varied patterns)
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Dropped by defeated enemies; player learns weapon switching and situational effectiveness
Accumulate around player ship; enable Thunder Sword activation
Surprise encounters within stages; teach pattern recognition
Culmination of stage mechanics; boss-specific weapon vulnerabilities
Requires two satellite ships; massive damage dealer; unlocks new combat strategy

typical_relief_triggers: Vertical scrolling to reveal safe zones with hidden pickups
typical_tension_triggers: Increased enemy density in horizontal scroll
Loss of satellite ships (Thunder Sword availability)
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Horizontal auto-scroll maintains forward momentum; vertical exploration allows breathing room and strategic repositioning; boss encounters punctuate stage progression with escalating difficulty

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Vertical scrolling reveals hidden enemy waves and concealed power-ups within large playing fields
spatial_grammar.secret_convention: Vertical exploration uncovers non-obvious pickup locations and alternate enemy patterns

difficulty_curve.early_game: First four stages selectable in any order; baseline weapons and movement mechanics; learning curve for vertical exploration mechanics
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Thunder Sword introduction (halfway through game); requirement for two satellite ships adds resource management complexity; enemies and bosses demand weapon selectivity
difficulty_curve.late_game: Increased enemy density and complexity; final bosses exploit learned patterns with new behaviors
notable_spikes: Mid-game spike: Thunder Sword acquisition threshold (requires satellite ship accumulation)
Boss encounters: Mid-stage and end-stage bosses represent local difficulty peaks requiring pattern recognition

notable_level_patterns.description: First four stages available in any order, allowing player choice in difficulty progression and weapon loadout familiarity before mandatory progression
Each stage contains large playing fields explorable vertically; up/down movement reveals distinct enemy waves and hidden power-ups, creating multiple solutions per stage
Automatic horizontal progression is interrupted by player-controlled vertical exploration, balancing forward momentum against strategic positioning and discovery
Stages contain both mid-stage and end-stage bosses, creating multiple tension peaks per level and preventing single climactic moment
Each weapon has situational advantages and drawbacks; bosses teach player to cycle through arsenal based on enemy behavior and damage optimization
